text: Avatar was directed by James Cameron. It stars Sam Worthington and Zoe Saldana. Released in 2009, it became the highest-grossing film of all time.
Oppenheimer is a biographical film directed by Christopher Nolan. It stars Cillian Murphy and was released in 2023. The film won Best Picture at the 2024 Academy Awards.
Inception directed by Christopher Nolan stars Leonardo DiCaprio. The film was produced by Warner Bros and was released in 2010.
